places.name: Jiufen Old Street
places.address: 基山街, 瑞芳區, 新北市, 九份
places.note: Hillside village of lantern-lit staircase alleys that partly inspired Spirited Away

places.name: Shifen Old Street
places.address: 十分老街, 平溪區, 新北市, 臺灣
places.note: Village on an active rail line, famous for sky lantern launches over the tracks

places.name: Shifen Waterfall
places.address: 新北市, 新寮, 臺灣
places.note: Taiwan's widest waterfall, 40m across, short paved walk from the old street
